name: Tesla, Inc.
description: Tesla, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, leases, and sells high-performance fully electric vehicles, solar energy generation systems, and energy storage products. The company operates through two segments: Automotive, and Energy Generation and Storage. Tesla's automotive segment includes the design and production of electric vehicles, while its energy segment focuses on the sale of solar and battery storage solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial customers. Founded in 2003, Tesla is a leader in the global transition to sustainable energy through its vertically integrated ecosystem of clean energy products.

investment_theses.company_type: EV & Battery Manufacturing / Vertical Integration in US
